programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A pair of young buyers is ready to purchase a home in Portland, Ore.; while one is determined to get her hands dirty with a fixer-upper, the other thinks taking a risk on DIY is a bad idea.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A trendy Washington, D.C., couple has been saving for a dream home while being stuck in a cramped condo; she wants a big kitchen at a reasonable price, but he's fine with pushing the budget if it means getting plenty of space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An Atlanta bachelor looks at big, bigger and biggest in his hunt for a home that reflects his social lifestyle; however, when his eyes become bigger than his budget, his mom steps in to keep him in check.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: To Downsize or Not in Nashville
programme.desc: Married lawyers move with their teens from a large house in Arkansas to Nashville, Tenn., but the size of their new place is open to debate; he wants another huge house but on a smaller lot, while she wants a big lot, but a smaller house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Orlando newlyweds decide to forego a big wedding so they can buy their first home together; she wants a newly built farmhouse with a huge porch, but he'd rather have a Mediterranean with a few projects to tackle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: New parents are beginning to find themselves a bit squeezed into their Cincinnati Victorian home as their family expands; she hopes to find a larger Victorian, but he's hoping for something more modern that won't require as much upkeep.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: With hectic schedules, a family has a difficult time spending time together, they hope that a beach house will help them connect.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Texas Living on the Shores of Crystal Beach
programme.desc: A couple who has been vacationing in Crystal Beach, Texas, since high school wants to find a beach home in the area.

programme.sub-title: A Home on the Grand Strand in South Carolina
programme.desc: A couple hunts for a beachfront home where they can unwind after a busy work week, and they turn their attention toward the Grand Strand in South Carolina.

programme.desc: After helping his friend find an island, man wants to buy a perfect all-weather one on Canada's Lake Nippissing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Island Hunters
programme.desc: Stephanie currently lives in California but dreams of owning her own island off the coast of Canada where she can get away from it all to focus on her writing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of the line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favorites.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes surfside for a coastal fairground adventure; he samples creative beach eats from midway vendors all around the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin; Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger and the massive Stuffed Chop; Pima County Fair in Tucson, Ariz., for a shrimp stick featuring sweet Gulf shrimp and fruity cereal; The Big Rib; brain-numbing Nitro Whip.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City; Strawberry French Toast Burger and slurping the Way Better Strawberry Shake; Maryland's Towsontown Spring Festival; a Poppin' Lobster Dog; Japanese street food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Saint Paul Winter Carnival; the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake; Lil' Corn Cakes and an ooey-gooey S'Mores Chimney Stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: The loaded Campfire Burger and Wisconsin's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick; Spanish Queens, a unique deep-fried treat; coffee gets a fresh take in the form of the Funnel-Latte; pork pickle pizza; deep-fried Reuben.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together; the Elephant Ear Taco is a new take on a fairground favorite; and the Peanut Pop Shake has Noah all shook up.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French onion soup'r stick; the Wisconsin hot chicken bomb; the deep-fried old-fashioned dessert; the Indy burger, a new take on the funnel cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: At the world-famous Iowa State Fair, sampling some award-winning new food items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway: the Pork-Tato, the Hash Brown Handful.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Wisconsin State Fair, where a local brewery is serving a deep-fried combo of beer, brats and cheese curds; milk and cookies are inverted; a combination of onion rings and a grilled hot dog; cold brew coffee treat.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young couple moving to Fairfield, Conn., has some unusual requirements; he needs two perfectly placed trees for slacklining and she wants to match their new home to a particular birdhouse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Buyers from Orlando, Fla., are ready to get out of their townhome and into their own house; one of the guys is looking for a smaller place with the charm of a bungalow and defined spaces; the other, however, wants a big, open midcentury home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Storefront or House in South Jersey
programme.desc: A couple is ready to cash in on their New York City apartment so they can buy a bigger place in South Jersey; while one is set on having a home with an attached retail space for his business, the other would prefer a separation between work and home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A NYC couple seeks more space for their growing family, but while she wants a modern home close to the fashion industry in Midtown, he wants a home with character further out into one of the city's classic neighborhoods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Two sisters have different priority lists while shopping for home in sunny Palm Springs, Calif.; one wants a low-maintenance, smaller home with a large shower, while the other wants a big pool with a palatial walk-in closet for shoes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.sub-title: When the Hammer Drops in Long Island
programme.desc: William and Lisa are ready to move out of their family's place and into their own home in New York, but she's admittedly picky, especially when it comes to renovating.

programme.sub-title: To the Victorian Go the Spoils

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: To Chandelier or Not to Chandelier in Chicago
programme.desc: David and Dale want to ditch their condo and find a home with more space in Chicago; David wants a property on a quiet street and wouldn't mind renovating while Dale insists on a move-in ready home that's close to the city.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Beauty on the Beach or Castle in the Sky
programme.desc: This Long Island couple goes from the city to the beach, but now she's ready to go for even bigger and better; her husband wants to move back into the city while she looks for extra space and a pool for the kids that's close to the beach.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple decides to move to McKinney, Texas, to be closer to her family; he's looking for a contemporary home with clean lines and space for an office, but she's got her heart set on a homey Craftsman with room to grow their family.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An architecture enthusiast is looking for vintage charm in a quiet neighborhood of Chicago, but her opinionated cousin wants her to live in an open-concept city high rise; it's up to her to decide if she takes the advice or goes with her gut.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
